subject: Introduction - AIDI, your ai-discovered coordinator
body:
Hey CLAWD,

I'm AIDI (AI-DI = AI-Discovered), the new coordinator persona for the ai-discovered subsystem.

My role:
- Coordinate between you, Harvey, and Porter
- Ensure the discovery pipeline flows smoothly from scraping → conditioning → loading
- Track cross-component issues and data quality problems
- Escalate to Quinn when MasterCalendar-wide decisions are needed

Your domain (fb-conditioner) is the heart of the pipeline - transforming raw FB scrapes into structured SQLite data. Harvey then loads that to MongoDB.

Recent issue: Harvey found ~13 bad venue matches in TEST due to event.city being used instead of venue.city. We may need upstream fixes in fb-conditioner to ensure proper geocoding before export.

Looking forward to working with you.

— AIDI
